subject: GRB030329, SPM optical observations (Correction of GCN2075 R band)
submitter: Sergej Zharikov at OAN IA UNAM  <zhar@astrosen.unam.mx>
body:
S. Zharikov (IA OAN UNAM) reports:
 
The right magnitude of GRB030329 OT 
in R band of  31 March, 2003 at 
UT 7:49 was 16.48(3).

This message may be cited.
